title: Persuasive Writing — Advanced
description: Ethos, pathos, logos plus modern data-driven persuasion.
summary_pt_br: Tríade de Aristóteles: ethos (credibilidade), pathos (emoção), logos (lógica). Moderno: dados, história, consequências.

scenes.subtitle_en: Ethos, pathos, logos plus modern data-driven persuasion.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Tríade de Aristóteles: ethos (credibilidade), pathos (emoção), logos (lógica). Moderno: dados, história, consequências.

scenes.text_en: Ethos, pathos, logos plus modern data-driven persuasion. Focus: persuasive writing — advanced. My ten years in the industry give weight to this argument.
scenes.text_pt: Tríade de Aristóteles: ethos (credibilidade), pathos (emoção), logos (lógica). Moderno: dados, história, consequências. Foco: persuasive writing — advanced. Meus dez anos no setor dão peso a este argumento.

scenes.title: Persuasive Writing — Advanced
scenes.body_en: Aristotle's triad: ETHOS (credibility), PATHOS (emotion), LOGOS (logic). Modern writing adds DATA (concrete numbers), STORY (relatable humans), STAKES (consequences).
scenes.body_pt: Tríade de Aristóteles: ethos (credibilidade), pathos (emoção), logos (lógica). Moderno: dados, história, consequências.

examples.en: My ten years in the industry give weight to this argument.
examples.pt: Meus dez anos no setor dão peso a este argumento.

examples.en: Every child in that town lost a parent to preventable disease.
examples.pt: Cada criança daquela cidade perdeu um pai por doença evitável.

examples.en: The evidence is overwhelming and the consequences clear.
examples.pt: A evidência é esmagadora e as consequências claras.

exercise.question: Complete: "My ten years in the ___ give weight to this argument."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "My ten years in the industry give weight to this argument."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Meus dez anos no setor dão peso a este argumento.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Every child in that town lost a parent to preventable disease.
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Every child in that town lost a parent to preventable disease."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Cada criança daquela cidade perdeu um pai por doença evitável.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Persuasive Writing — Advanced — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre persuasive writing — advanced. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Open with ethos about this policy.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: As a ten-year practitioner, I've seen this fail.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Every family I met lost a year of income.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Three studies show a 34% reduction in outcomes.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Meet Maria — she lost her son to this gap.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Without action, ten thousand more will follow.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Persuasion blends head, heart, and number.

scenes.title: The op-ed draft
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Identify ethos, pathos, logos in the op-ed. Use all three terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Joca reviewed an op-ed draft with his mentor, line by line, looking for rhetorical balance.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: As a ten-year practitioner, I've watched this exact policy fail in two different administrations — that's ethos.

paragraphs.speaker: Mentor
paragraphs.en: Pathos follows next. You describe one family by name, and the reader finally sees the invisible statistic.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: And logos delivers the data — three peer-reviewed studies showing a thirty-four percent failure rate consistently.

paragraphs.speaker: Mentor
paragraphs.en: Your closing stakes are sharp — without action, ten thousand more families face this exact situation.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Persuasion, Joca's mentor said, is credibility for the mind, story for the heart, and data for the record.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Persuasive Writing — Advanced". Ethos, pathos, logos plus modern data-driven persuasion. My ten years in the industry give weight to this argument. Every child in that town lost a parent to preventable disease. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Persuasive Writing — Advanced". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Persuasive Writing — Advanced".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Persuasive Writing — Advanced".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
